title: ADT Execution Authorization Binding Schema
description: External authorization evidence that gates execution AFTER the Governance Router. Binds repository, base SHA, branch, authorized actions, and authorized write scope. The adapter MUST NOT self-set human_holder_approved: true.

authority_source.description: Citation or summary of the authority source (e.g., 'Human Holder directive #42', 'Project Control authorization record').

human_role.description: The governance role of the authorizing human (e.g., 'HUMAN_HOLDER', 'PROJECT_CONTROL'). Must be a recognized ADT role.

repository.description: Owner/repository string (e.g., 'owner/project'). Must match TaskIntake.repository and live git origin.

base_sha.description: Full 40-character Git SHA of the base commit. Must match TaskIntake.base_sha and live git origin.

branch.description: Target branch for the task. Must match TaskIntake.branch and live git origin.

authorized_actions.description: Actions permitted under this authorization. Default-forbidden actions (ready, merge, close_pr, delete_branch) MUST NOT appear here unless separately authorized.

authorized_write_scope.description: Files this authorization permits writing to. plan.write_scope MUST be a subset (⊆) of this — not equality. Paths are relative to repository root.

human_holder_approved.description: EXTERNAL ONLY. The adapter MUST NOT self-set this to true. Must be set by an external governance process prior to adapter receipt.

risk_boundary.description: Maximum permitted risk level. CRITICAL risk tasks require separate Human Holder authorization and cannot be authorized by this binding alone.

task_id.description: The task ID this authorization binds to (e.g., 'ADT-RUNTIME-ADAPTER-CONTRACT-R1').
